raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Asserting exclusive individual agency over one's existential or spiritual state, functioning as an exhortation to self-reliance.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "A distinct 'self' exists that is capable of intentional alteration.",
    "No external agent, force, or other being possesses causal power over that self's condition.",
    "The relevant 'condition' is fundamentally internal and responsive to solitary volition."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent within radical monadic or strictly karmic ontologies that treat the self as sovereign and isolated.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "Individual free will is metaphysically absolute and external or relational influences are either illusory or subordinate.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Ontological interdependence, collective fields, or external spiritual agencies genuinely shape personal condition."
}

The relevant 'condition' is fundamentally internal and responsive to solitary volition.
